name: rowan
desc: A village elder in his seventies with a calm, warm, sly-eyed neutral expression: long grey hair, heavy grey eyebrows, a long grey beard, kind crinkled eyes with a knowing glint. He wears a dusty violet robe with gold trim and holds a wooden staff topped with a small glowing amber stone.
sheetHint: long grey hair, heavy brows, long grey beard, dusty violet gold-trimmed robe, amber-topped wooden staff, slightly stooped
